## 🎯 Type of Change

<!-- Mark the relevant option with an "x" -->

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] 🎨 Style update (formatting, renaming)
- [ ] ♻️ Code refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] ✅ Test update
- [ ] 🔧 Build configuration change
- [ ] 🔒 Security fix

## ✅ Checklist

<!-- Mark completed items with an "x" -->

### Code Quality
- [ ] My code follows the project's coding standards
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes

### TypeScript
- [ ] All TypeScript types are properly defined
- [ ] No use of `any` type (unless absolutely necessary and documented)
- [ ] Type checking passes (`npm run type-check`)

### Testing
- [ ] All tests pass (`npm test`)
- [ ] Code coverage is maintained or improved
- [ ] Edge cases are covered

### Linting & Formatting
- [ ] ESLint passes with no errors (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] Code is formatted with Prettier (`npm run format`)
- [ ] No console.log statements left in code

### Git
- [ ] My commits follow the conventional commits specification
- [ ] My branch is up to date with the base branch
- [ ] I have rebased my branch if needed

### Documentation
- [ ] README.md updated (if needed)
- [ ] Documentation in `/docs` updated (if needed)
- [ ] API documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Comments added for complex logic

## 🚀 Deployment Notes

<!-- Any special deployment considerations? -->

- [ ] Requires environment variable changes
- [ ] Requires database migration
- [ ] Requires backend API changes
- [ ] Breaking changes that require user notification
